name: Herbag cloth handbag
description:
Recent photos show; the condition of the bag matches the pictures. Warehouse Number: Bridge125
The exterior, interior lining, hardware, and bottom edges of the bag may have slight scratches, stains, wrinkles, and dents. Please refer to the photos for details. All photos are taken in the actual environment and include the accompanying accessories.
Before the bag is sent out, our professional department will perform free maintenance and cleaning services to ensure it reaches you in the most perfect condition, including but not limited to repairing worn areas and polishing the hardware. All these services will be completed before shipment. Please be assured that these services will not affect the bag's functionality.
Please note: The color of the item may vary slightly due to differences in light and monitors.
If you have any questions or need a quote, please feel free to contact us. Happy shopping!
Hermes herbag black canvas with leather, silver buckle, size: 31*25*10cm
